title: Pharma Company Bus Overturns in Miyapur, 10 Employees Injured, Probe Underway
summary: Hyderabad: Ten employees sustained injuries after a pharmaceutical company's bus overturned in Miyapur on the city's outskirts, triggering an immediate response from emergency services.The incident...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
contentHtml:
Hyderabad: Ten employees sustained injuries after a pharmaceutical company's bus overturned in Miyapur on the city's outskirts, triggering an immediate response from emergency services.

The incident took place when the staff bus reportedly went out of control and overturned, causing panic among passengers and resulting in multiple injuries.

Rescue teams and emergency personnel quickly reached the accident site and shifted the injured individuals to nearby hospitals for treatment. Authorities confirmed that none of the victims suffered life-threatening injuries.

Initial reports indicate that the driver may have lost control of the vehicle, although the exact cause of the accident is still under investigation. Officials have launched a probe to determine the circumstances leading to the mishap.

The accident has once again raised concerns about the safety of employee transport vehicles, especially those operated by private firms in industrial and suburban areas.

Police stated that further action will be taken based on the findings of the investigation, with more details expected as the inquiry progresses, reports The Hindu.
